overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a high-speed motorcycle ride along an elevated highway during golden hour. The camera weaves through futuristic traffic under concrete overpasses, crossing from the left shoulder to the right side while the Night City skyline becomes visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway underpass with concrete median barrier

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along the left shoulder of the elevated highway, overtaking slower traffic while remaining under the overpass

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving in the right lane, overtaken by the ego vehicle

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass creating a roof over the roadway
tall concrete barrier separating the highway lanes
horizontal slat metal fence running along the outer edge of the highway
futuristic glass and steel skyscrapers visible in the distance through the haze
tall modern street light poles lining the left side of the highway

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a steady drive along the left shoulder of an elevated highway beneath a massive concrete overpass. Warm golden hour light streams in from the side, illuminating the concrete median barrier on the right and the metal safety fence on the left. Futuristic vehicles pass by in the adjacent lanes while the distant glass skyscrapers of Night City remain visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway crossing zone with red diagonal markings

events.description: begins crossing from the left shoulder to the right lane across the red striped crosswalk area
completes the lane change and enters the right side of the highway with open view of the city skyline

agents.ego_description: executing a diagonal lane change from the left shoulder across traffic to the right side of the highway

entered.detail: diagonal red and white striped markings indicating a no-parking or crossing zone on the asphalt
bright sun becoming visible as the camera turns, creating strong backlighting

segments.scene_description: The camera initiates a lane change maneuver, crossing the red-striped highway markings from the left shoulder to the right lane. As the turn completes, the perspective shifts dramatically—the concrete median barrier moves to the left, the metal fence appears on the right, and the glass skyscrapers of the city center come into direct view as the sun becomes visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with open city skyline view

events.description: sun becomes directly visible creating strong lens flare and warm backlighting across the scene

agents.ego_description: driving along the right side of the highway with the sunlit city skyline prominent, overtaking various futuristic vehicles

notable_agents.action: yellow compact car driving in the left lane, passed by the ego vehicle

segments.scene_description: Driving steadily along the right side of the elevated highway, the scene is dominated by the warm golden hour sunlight streaming from the right and the impressive glass skyscrapers of the city center directly ahead. The concrete overpass structure continues overhead on the left, while various futuristic vehicles are overtaken in the flow of traffic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous high-speed ride along an elevated highway that shifts from a sheltered shoulder drive into a direct, sun-drenched approach toward the city center. It begins with a steady drive along the left shoulder beneath a massive concrete overpass, where warm golden hour light illuminates a metal safety fence and a concrete median barrier. As the camera initiates a lane change, it crosses red-striped highway markings to move from the left shoulder to the right lane, causing the perspective to shift as the median barrier moves to the left and the sun emerges on the horizon. The scene then opens up as the camera settles into the right lane, with the glass skyscrapers of Night City coming into direct view. Finally, the ride continues steadily forward, overtaking futuristic vehicles while the golden sunlight streams in from the right under the lingering shadow of the overhead concrete structure.
